_comment: Manual club assignment overrides. Applied after alias normalisation. Athlete-level entries take priority over competition-level entries. Competition names must match exactly as they appear in competitions.json.

hosts._comment: Maps competition name → hosting club code. Bare colour/team codes (WHI, BLU, RED etc.) in that competition are auto-assigned to the host.

by_competition._comment: Format: { "Competition Name": { "RAW_CODE": "CANONICAL_CODE" } }. Colour codes for already-ingested data — future ingests use the hosts section automatically.

by_athlete._comment: Format: { competition, athlete (exact name), club (canonical code) }
